title: dryopteris glandulosa var. brachyodus
intro: Dryopteris glandulosa var. brachyodus is a variety of the Dryopteris genus, commonly known as the woodland fern or autumn fern, which is a type of evergreen fern native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris glandulosa var. brachyodus include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and aid in the relief of symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and teas, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance in the body.
